name: Iberia Mine-Waste Alpha
description: First batch ranking of six Iberian AOIs spanning W-Sn districts, the Iberian Pyrite Belt, exhausted Pb-Zn-Ag districts and Portuguese W-Sn-Li belt. Sprint 2.3 demo: produced by geaspirit.opportunity backend with the prospectivity bridge enabled (drop GeaSpirit normalised outputs under data/opportunity/prospectivity_manual/ to lift the geological sub-score).
disclaimer: Each ranked AOI is a desk-validation candidate. NOT a resource declaration. NOT a financial forecast. Legal title check and accredited sampling required before any commercial action. The default connector set hits OSM Overpass at run time; offline runs require a populated Overpass cache.
